ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Dennis M. Carr, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Christine Huynh Tang. Plaintiff Christine Huyn Tang is present.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Antonio Rodolfo Diaz.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed.
Plaintiff Christine Tang is Sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

1)For Plaintiff Christopher Tang and against Defendant Antonio Rudolfo Diaz:

Damages: $17,103.00
Costs: $350.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $7,453.00
Judgment signed in open court.(see scanned judgment for details)

2)For Plaintiff Christine Huynh Tang and against Defendant Antonio Rudolfo Diaz:

Damages: $15,450.00
Costs: $350.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $15,800.00
Judgment signed in open court.(see scanned judgment for details)

Total of (2) Judgments signed in Open Court.
